title: geranium bolivarianum
intro: Geranium bolivarianum, also known as Bolivian geranium, is a plant species from the geranium genus that is native to South America, particularly in the Andes region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Geranium bolivarianum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
